outcomes.description: Create, retrieve, update, and delete items persisted in the PostgreSQL database.

scenarios.scenario: Create new item via POST API
scenarios.description: POST /api/items receives name and description as required query parameters. ItemService.create_item delegates to ItemRepository.create, which constructs an Item ORM object (completed=False default), calls db.add + db.commit + db.refresh on the items table. A PostgreSQL trigger (audit_trigger_func) fires AFTER INSERT on items and inserts a row into audit_logs. Returns ItemResponse containing the persisted item fields.

actions.description: Inbound REST endpoint handled by create_item in routes.py. Query parameters: name (str, required), description (str, required). SQLAlchemy Session injected via get_db dependency. Response model: ItemResponse.

apis.request: name: str (query param, required); description: str (query param, required)
apis.response: ItemResponse: {id: int, name: str, description: str, completed: bool, created_at: datetime, updated_at: datetime}

actions.description: name: str; required query parameter; FastAPI enforces presence and type coercion from query string; no length or format constraints defined in the handler or schema.
description: str; required query parameter; FastAPI enforces presence and type coercion from query string; no length or format constraints defined in the handler or schema.

steps.step: Persist item and record audit trail

actions.action: Persist new item to items table
actions.description: ItemService.create_item -> ItemRepository.create -> table items; constructs Item(name=name, description=description, completed=False); columns: id (Integer PK auto), name (String, indexed), description (String), completed (Boolean, default=False), created_at (DateTime, default=utcnow), updated_at (DateTime, default=utcnow); db.add(new_item) + db.commit() + db.refresh(new_item). Indexes: ix_items_name_desc(name, description), ix_item_status_time(completed, updated_at).

actions.action: Insert audit log entry for item creation
actions.description: PostgreSQL trigger audit_trigger_func() defined in database.py fires AFTER INSERT on items table (trigger: audit_items_trigger); inserts into audit_logs: table_name='items', action='INSERT', record_id=NEW.id, created_at=NOW(). Triggered automatically by the db.commit() in the persist step.

Serializes refreshed Item ORM object to ItemResponse (Pydantic, from_attributes=True): id (int, auto-generated PK), name (str), description (str), completed (bool, always False on creation), created_at (datetime, UTC), updated_at (datetime, UTC).

skippedComponents.reason: AuditService is imported in routes.py but not injected or called in the create_item handler; scope is this EP only.
AuditLogResponse schema is for GET /api/audit endpoint only, not used in create_item.
Config module supplies DATABASE_URL to SQLAlchemy engine only; no route prefix or queue name resolution needed for this EP.

sideEffects.identifier: audit_trigger_func -> table audit_logs (AFTER INSERT on items)

branchesAndErrors.what: no error branches in create_item path
